这是 ![](https://example.com/a.png) 和 **粗体**。

`<img src="//lain.bgm.tv/pic/photo/l/example.jpg" data-bgm-photo-id="123" data-bgm-photo-filename="example.jpg" />`

```
<img src="https://example.com/a.png" width="320" height="240" />
[img]https://example.com/raw.png[/img]
[b]raw[/b]
```
